description: A supply planner needs to forecast demand for an agricultural chemical with highly seasonal sales to inform the production plan.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the sales history for the product for the past three years.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully pulls historical sales data, showing peaks in the spring.

nodes.task_description: Apply a seasonal forecasting model to the historical data to predict demand for the upcoming season.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a demand forecast of 500 metric tons for the next quarter.

nodes.task_description: Share the forecast with the production planning team to be used as input for the master production schedule.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully transmits the forecast data to the production planning module.
